articles.description: BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty picks his 26-man England World Cup squad.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Who will make Thomas Tuchel's England squad? Do you agree with Phil McNulty's choices?

articles.description: England's World Cup hopes rest on captain Harry Kane after a grim taste of life without him in the defeat against Japan at Wembley, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: England 0-1 Japan: A failed experiment as Tuchel gets grim glimpse of life without Harry Kane

articles.description: All the latest football news and views on England's goal-scoring prospects in this summer's World Cup following a disappointing friendly defeat to Japan on Tuesday.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Who are England's best strikers?

articles.description: Italy fail to qualify for a third World Cup in a row after penalty defeat by Bosnia-Herzegovina in play-off final.
articles.title: Italy miss World Cup: Bosnia-Herzegovina shootout defeat means Azzurri fail to reach tournament for third time in a row

articles.description: Tiger Woods says he is "stepping away for a period of time to seek treatment and focus on my health" following an arrest after a car crash.
articles.title: Tiger Woods: Golfer to 'step away and seek treatment' after crash arrest

articles.description: Manchester United are within touching distance of a return to the Champions League. How has interim boss Michael Carrick done it?
articles.title: Manchester United: How Michael Carrick steered club towards Champions League

articles.description: The World Cup includes 48 nations, but there are still a number of top players who have missed out on qualification.
articles.title: Six stars who will not be playing at the 2026 World Cup in Canada, USA & Mexico

articles.description: The final six nations have qualified for the 2026 World Cup - this is your essential lowdown on the expanded edition of the tournament.

articles.description: Emma Raducanu delays the start of her clay-court season as she continues to recover from a viral illness, according to her representatives.
articles.title: Emma Raducanu withdraws from Linz Open after viral illness

articles.description: There is a section of Scotland supporters who have taken to booing the head coach and the team. With a World Cup coming, they need to keep perspective, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Ivory Coast 1-0 Scotland: 'Scotland fans can fret - but they need to keep perspective too'
